title: Keepers of the Stones II
description: Keepers of the Stones II is a mod created as a continuation of the original version of the Keepers of the Stones mod. It adds new elemental stones that can be used to improve the character's skills and powers.
body:
# About

Keepers of the Stones II is a mod created as a continuation of the original version of the Keepers of the Stones mod. It adds new elemental stones that can be used to improve the character's skills and powers. At the same time, the second version of the mod improves the combat mechanics and adds many new features and abilities. For example, players can now use stones not only for attack, but also for defense, healing, and even time management. It is also now possible to create your own combinations by combining different elements. In addition, the leveling and crafting systems have been improved in Keepers of the Stones II, making the game even more interesting and exciting.

For a better gaming experience, it is recommended to install the following mods:
- [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli) — to access the interactive mod's guide.
- [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) — for improved integration and balancing of the mod's combat system.

![Stone is activated](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b31dfbec99caba73598d99d93adba7bc63033046.png)

![The box and the stones of the elements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15f7123a4339b2139444c6d7bf71716e2ff7a002.png)
